channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: AI might run your next employee training
item.description: It’s almost become cliche for employers to express concern about Gen Z’s lack of training in the social skills necessary for life in the office.
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: Smartphone Apps May Put Diabetes Patients at Risk - FDA Warns
item.description: The Food and Drug Administration has issued a warning about smartphone apps used to manage diabetes, citing cases of dangerously low blood sugar and even death due to missed notifications.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Perrone, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: SAP: Latest news and insights
item.description: SAP is an enterprise software vendor based in Walldorf, Germany. Its cloud and on-premises enterprise resource planning (ERP) software, including S/4HANA, helps organizations manage their business operations and customer relations.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: AI to shake up Salesforce workforce with possible shift to sales over IT
item.description: Salesforce apparently wants to cut 1,000 jobs to hire new staff elsewhere as part of an effort to bring its new AI products to customers, according to financial news service Bloomberg, citing internal sources.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: AI takes big step forward with 3D-printed shoe
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nikon's first 35mm f/1.2 looks like my dream prime lens – apart from the price tag
item.description: Nikon finally unveils its long awaited Z 35mm f/1.2 S, and it's Nikon's third f/1.2 lens following the 50mm and 85mm primes.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Researchers link DeepSeek’s blockbuster chatbot to Chinese telecom banned from doing business in US
item.description: Experts say DeepSeek has computer code that could send some user login information to a Chinese state-owned company.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Bring it on Nvidia - AMD confirms new Radeon RX 9000 series GPUs will launch in early March, rivaling Team Green's rumored RTX 5060 Ti and 5060 launch
item.description: The race is finally on between AMD and Nvidia, with the Radeon RX 9000 series GPUs set for launch in early March.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Google removes weapons development, surveillance pledges from AI ethics policy
item.description: Google has updated its ethical policies on artificial intelligence, eliminating a pledge to not use AI technology for weapons development and surveillance.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Fast fashion, laptops and toys are likely to cost more due to US tariffs on Chinese imports
item.description: A sweeping new U.S. tariff on products made in China is expected to increase the prices American consumers pay for a wide array of products, from the ultra-cheap apparel sold on online shopping platforms to toys and electronic devices such as computers and cellphones.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: The Switch 2 Nintendo Direct now has official times for its April 2 broadcast
item.description: We now have an official time for the April 2 Nintendo Switch 2 Direct, and it's probably exactly what you expected.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: LinkedIn’s bet on TikTok-style video is paying off in a big way
item.description: Is LinkedIn the new TikTok? Short-form video is now the fastest-growing category on LinkedIn, growing at twice the rate of other post formats on the platform. According to LinkedIn, total video viewership surged 36% in the first quarter of 2025.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Israeli spyware company confirms US government and friends are customers
item.description: Israeli spyware company Paragon says the US government is a customer, shortly after it was called out by WhatsApp for targeting journalists.
item.dc:creator: benedict.collins@futurenet.com (Benedict Collins), TechRadar

item.title: If this Xiaomi 15 Ultra camera rumor is true, it could rival the Galaxy S25 Ultra
item.description: A new rumor suggests the Xiaomi 15 Ultra will come equipped with one of the most powerful camera systems ever fitted to a smartphone, which could give some of our favorite camera phones a serious run for their money.
item.dc:creator: jamie.richards@futurenet.com (Jamie Richards), TechRadar

item.title: The Google Pixel 9a freebies have seemingly leaked, but there’s one notable omission
item.description: The Google Pixel 9a might come with a trio of free subscriptions, but could miss out on an AI upgrade.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: DeepSeek's rise raises data privacy, national security concerns
item.description: The emergence of a newly popular artificial intelligence (AI) model from Chinese startup DeepSeek is raising national security and data privacy concerns for the U.S., not unlike those that spurred a ban on TikTok last month.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Salesforce: Latest news and insights
item.description: Salesforce is a vendor of cloud-based software and applications for sales, customer service, marketing automation, ecommerce, analytics, and application development. Based in San Francisco, Calif.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Cloud development environments for the win
item.description: About 30 years ago this week, Delphi 1.0 was released. Many of you probably have no idea what Delphi is, but it was a revolutionary rapid application development environment tool. Delphi made developing Windows applications orders of magnitude faster than it had been before.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Qorgau: Kazakhstan’s smart policing revolution in traffic management
item.description: Traffic management is a growing challenge for cities worldwide, requiring a balance between enforcement, efficiency, and public trust. In Kazakhstan, the Qorgau system is redefining road safety through an innovative fusion of artificial intelligence (AI), computer vision, and mobile technology.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The value of Trump’s memecoin has dropped more than 75% since inauguration
item.description: Donald Trump drew plenty of criticism by launching his own branded memecoin three days before his inauguration, including from the crypto community which argued he was making a mockery of the crypto world by tying himself to the memecoin world, which could damage efforts to make crypto reforms.
item.dc:creator: Chris Morris, Fast Company

item.title: Automated builds, tests, and quality gates are key to software quality – report
item.description: When it comes to software quality, the top three practices cited for production readiness include automated building and deploying, automated tests, and automated quality gates for every merge request, according to the JetBrains Qodana State of Software Quality Report 2024.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Google's rising holiday's season ad sales aren't enough to ease worries about AI letdown
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google's digital ad sales continued to grow at a healthy clip during the holiday season, but that wasn't enough to offset investors' worries about whether its big bet on artificial intelligence will be lucrative as once envisioned.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: California universities launch “landmark” AI quest for students and profs
item.description: The California State University system has teamed up with several tech titans to launch a "landmark" AI quest.
item.dc:creator: George Avalos, The Mercury News

item.title: Hawley makes push to allow parents to sue tech companies
item.description: Sen. Josh Hawley (R-Mo.) said Tuesday he will introduce legislation to empower parents to sue leading social media companies over alleged harms to children and teens.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: 2025 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Reports: NorthBay Health data breach affected more than 500,000 patients
item.description: The healthcare system was forced to turn patients away and cancel appointments for a short time following the attack.
item.dc:creator: Robin Miller, The Mercury News

item.title: AMD patches microcode security holes after accidental early disclosure
item.description: AMD on Monday issued two patches for severe microcode security flaws, defects that AMD said “could lead to the loss of Secure Encrypted Virtualization (SEV) protection.” The bugs were inadvertently revealed by a partner last week.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Google makes its appeal to overturn jury verdict branding the Play Store as illegal monopoly
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google went to appeals court Monday in an attempt to convince a three-judge panel to overturn a jury's verdict declaring its app store for Android smartphones as an illegal monopoly and block the penalties imposed by a federal judge to stop the misbehavior.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Canada's most populous province to pause retaliatory measures as US puts tariffs on hold
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — The leader of Ontario, Canada’s most populous province, said Monday he will pause all retaliatory measures against the United States after news broke that the threat of tariffs has been put on hold for a month.
item.dc:creator: ROB GILLIES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Linux Foundation’s L3AF brings zero-downtime updates to eBPF network management
item.description: A challenge for enterprises that operate large-scale network infrastructure has long been how to maintain performance while updating critical systems.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Microsoft founder Bill Gates explores the making of his internal operating system in new memoir
item.description: As he prepares to turn 70 later this year, Microsoft founder Bill Gates' new memoir explores how his childhood quirks, upbringing, friendships and experiences coalesced into shaping his internal operating system.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bill Gates shares his thoughts on vaccine backlash, Intel's woes and Google's antitrust battle
item.description: Although Microsoft founder Bill Gates sat down for an interview with The Associated Press to discuss his new memoir, “Source Code: My Beginnings,” he also shared his views on a variety of other topics, including vaccine conspiracy views about him, his thoughts on the struggles of longtime computer c
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Wheeled wonder robot dog shows off crazy dance moves in all kinds of tough terrain
item.description: Lynx the robot dog from China is pushing boundaries of what autonomous mobile robots can achieve with a groundbreaking design and unique mobility.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Texas governor orders ban on DeepSeek, RedNote for government devices
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Texas Republican Gov. Greg Abbott issued a ban on Chinese artificial intelligence company DeepSeek for government-issued devices, becoming the first state to restrict the popular chatbot in such a manner.
item.dc:creator: NADIA LATHAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: JavaScript Temporal to ease dates and times
item.description: Web developers will soon find it easier to work with dates and times in JavaScript, thanks to emerging browser support for JavaScript’s Temporal object, according to Mozilla.
item.dc:creator: Info World
